title: Software Update - DFU - Updating screen above 90%
scenario: DFU update via Software Update screen shows "Verifying" message from 90% to 99% with "Almost there, don't leave yet" text
steps: Open the Software Update screen on the device.
Monitor the update progress until it reaches 90%.
Observe the screen when the update reaches 90%.
expected: When the update reaches 90%, the progress bar should change to show a "Verifying" message, and the screen should display the text "Almost there, don't leave yet" from 90% to 99%.
